questions.explanation: Lightning is caused by electric discharge between clouds or between cloud and earth due to charge accumulation.
While we know earthquake-prone areas, the exact time and magnitude of earthquakes cannot be predicted accurately.

questions.correctAnswer: An instrument that records seismic waves during an earthquake.
questions.explanation: A seismograph records the vibrations produced by earthquakes. The Richter scale measures earthquake magnitude.
Like charges repel each other, unlike charges attract. This is a fundamental law of electrostatics.
